13698.history: Displacement: 275 tons. Completed in April 1898. Requisitioned by the Admiralty on 13 September 1939. Served as auxiliary. Sold in February 1946.

13701.history: Completed in May 1937. Requisitioned by the Admiralty in October 1939. Served on harbour duties. Sold in 1945.

13704.history: Displacement: 235 tons. Completed in March 1895. Requisitioned by the Admiralty in October 1939. Served on examination service. Laid up in 1944. Sold in 1948>

13705.history: Completed in February 1928. Requisitioned by the Admiralty in October 1939. Served on examination service. Returned in January 1946

13706.history: Displacement: 222 tons. Completed in June 1926. Requisitioned by the Admiralty in October 1939. Served as minesweeper / danlayer. Mined and sunk off the Isle of Wight on 6 June 1943.
